case_title: AWL SEDAN & LIMOUSINE CO. VS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE CO. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE CO.

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE CO. QURESHI, FARRUK N.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,372.76 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE CO. QURESHI, FARRUK N. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AWL SEDAN & LIMOUSINE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AWL SEDAN & LIMOUSINE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE CO. QURESHI, FARRUK N. $4,680.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,732.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE CO. QURESHI, FARRUK N. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT AWL SEDAN & LIMOUSINE CO. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
